name: SplitButton
description: SplitButton groups a set of commands in an overlay with a default command.

props.name: label
props.description: Text of the button.

props.name: icon
props.description: Name of the icon.

props.name: model
props.description: MenuModel instance to define the overlay items.

props.name: autoZIndex
props.description: Whether to automatically manage layering.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: appendTo
props.description: A valid query selector or an HTMLElement to specify where the overlay gets attached. Special keywords are 'body' for document body and 'self' for the element itself.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When present, it specifies that the element should be disabled.

props.name: fluid
props.description: Spans 100% width of the container when enabled.

props.name: class
props.description: Style class of the component.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline style of the component.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the default button.

props.name: menuButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the menu button.

props.name: menuButtonIcon
props.description: Name of the menu button icon.

props.name: dropdownIcon
props.description: Name of the menu button icon.

props.name: severity
props.description: Defines the style of the button.

props.name: raised
props.description: Add a shadow to indicate elevation.

props.name: rounded
props.description: Add a circular border radius to the button.

props.name: text
props.description: Add a textual class to the button without a background initially.

props.name: outlined
props.description: Add a border class without a background initially.

props.name: size
props.description: Defines the size of the button.

props.name: plain
props.description: Add a plain textual class to the button without a background initially.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: click
events.description: Callback to invoke when main button is clicked.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Button part of the content can easily be customized with the default slot instead of using the built-in modes.

slots.name: buttoncontent
slots.description: Command button part of the content can easily be customized with the button content slot.

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: menubuttonicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: dropdownicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon. */ class: string; }): VNode[]

slots.name: menuitemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: TieredMenuRouterBindProps; /** * Whether or not there is a submenu */ hasSubmenu: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom content for each menu item.
